message: 🌱 Add meshery: [Server] Race condition in K8s component registration mission (#685)

@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "meshery-6357-server-race-condition-in-k8s-component-registration",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "meshery: [Server] Race condition in K8s component registration",
+    "description": "[Server] Race condition in K8s component registration. Requested by 2+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current meshery deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your meshery version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n meshery -l app.kubernetes.io/name=meshery\nhelm list -n meshery 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working meshery installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review meshery configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant meshery configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n meshery -l app.kubernetes.io/name=meshery\nkubectl get configmap -n meshery -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=meshery\n```\nIn the following code, the reference to range value `ctx` at line 86 generates a race condition because it is a reference in the body of a gorutine."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Server] Race condition in K8s component registration",
+        "description": "This PR fixes #6357\n\nThis PR fix the race condition by passing the range value as argument of the concurrent function.\nThe PR also includes some code reorganization to make it more GO idiomatic.\n```yaml\nIteration at context-1\nIteration at context-2\nIteration at context-3\nIteration at context-4\nIteration at context-5\nConcurrently using context-5\nConcurrently using context-5\nConcurrently using context-5\nConcurrently using context-5\nConcurrently using context-5\n\nProgram exited.\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n meshery -l app.kubernetes.io/name=meshery\nkubectl get events -n meshery --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[Server] Race condition in K8s component registration\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR fixes #6357\n\nThis PR fix the race condition by passing the range value as argument of the concurrent function.\nThe PR also includes some code reorganization to make it more GO idiomatic.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Iteration at context-1\nIteration at context-2\nIteration at context-3\nIteration at context-4\nIteration at context-5\nConcurrently using context-5\nConcurrently using context-5\nConcurrently using context-5\nConcurrently using context-5\nConcurrently using context-5\n\nProgram exited."
+      ]
+    }
+  },
